events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Key call: the plastigauge reading indicates an out-of-spec (installed-defective) bearing clearance, so the sequence must halt there — the crankshaft/camshaft must not be rotated and no timing chain/sprockets installed until the clearance is corrected and re-verified with a fresh plastigauge check torqued per OEM sequence without rotation. Decision is `fail` with `high` risk given the bearing-failure exposure if assembly proceeded past this gate.
